revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410180721|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Flagicon_image%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} This template generates an icon for the specified image given in {{para|1}}, matching the size, [[:en:CSS|CSS]] class, and other attributes of images produced by {{tl|Flag icon}}. It can be used for arbitrary images not included in any [[:Category:Country data templates]]. Please consider the [[Wikipedia:Manual of Style (icons)#Flags|Manual of Style section on flags]] before using this template. Use caution when applying this template in infoboxes, as flags are generally discouraged in that context per [[:en:MOS:INFOBOXFLAG|MOS:INFOBOXFLAG]]. Additional considerations include avoiding flags used purely for decoration and ensuring historical accuracy. For further guidance, see [[MOS:FLAGS]]. {{resbox|[[File:Red copyright.svg|18x18px|link=]] ''Do not use this template to display [[Wikipedia:Non-free images|non-free images]], as they are also not permitted in country data templates.''}} ;Usage : {{flagicon image|image name|size=optional|border=optional|link=optional}} ;Examples : {{flagicon image|Red flag.svg}} → {{flagicon image|Red flag.svg}} : {{flagicon image|Red flag.svg|size=30x20px|link=Japan}} → {{flagicon image|Red flag.svg|size=30x20px|link=Japan}} : {{flagicon image|ICS Alfa.svg|border=}} → {{flagicon image|ICS Alfa.svg|border=}} == See also == {{tl|ListFlag}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Flag template system| ]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
